tier_rationale: This updates multiple operational role guide documents to require role-based Researcher routing for search/research/current-fact requests. It does not modify runtime product code.
request_summary: Strengthen the guides so research/search/current-fact work is routed through the Researcher role instead of being treated as an Analyst-only answer.
goal: Document a role-first routing rule: if a user asks for search, research, current external facts, official documentation verification, or model availability guidance, Analyst must create a Researcher instruction and execute the Researcher procedure, even if the procedure is performed inside the same session.

positive: Update Analyst guide with mandatory Researcher routing triggers.
Update Researcher guide so in-session execution still counts as Researcher work when the Researcher procedure and output are used.
Update CURRENT_STATE.md authority versions and core decisions.
Preserve the rule that external CLI fallback is optional unless explicitly needed or requested.
Require disclosure of the execution mode in the answer or records.
negative: Do not require external CLI fallback for every research request.
Do not violate runtime platform restrictions on subagent spawning.
Do not allow Researcher to bypass Analyst.
Do not add runtime product code.

success_criteria: docs/agents/analyst.md states that user requests for search/research/latest/current external facts/official docs/model availability must be routed through Researcher procedure.
docs/agents/analyst.md distinguishes Researcher role routing from external CLI fallback and prevents Analyst-only answers for research triggers.
docs/agents/researcher.md defines in-session Researcher execution as valid only when the Researcher instruction, source review, confidence, and Research Summary are produced.
CURRENT_STATE.md records the updated document versions and role-first research routing decision.
npm run check:encoding and node scripts/check-doc-headers.mjs pass.
Merged local task branch is deleted after main push.

context.relevant_history: The assistant previously answered a model-selection question using session web search without clearly routing it as Researcher work. The user wants role-based execution to be mandatory.
